title: Ball / Shell Catalog
description: Per-shell physics character + blast/damage data. DDTank shell character is modeled as data tuned to feel right on Vektram's Velocity Verlet core (ADR-0002, ADR-0005), NOT a copy of DDTank's legacy 25Hz Euler integrator. Hosts read this file and hand the text to Sim.Content.BallCatalog.FromJson; /sim never does file I/O. KNOWN DEFERRED ITEM: velocity-dependent air-resistance drag (DDTank DragIndex) is intentionally NOT modeled here — it would make per-shot acceleration non-constant and void ADR-0002's analytic-exactness guarantee. Adding it requires its own ADR-0002 amendment + integrator re-validation. The heavy/floaty + wind-drift feel is captured via gravityScale + windSensitivity instead.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking changes; old artefacts must remain loadable for the compatibility window (see content/CLAUDE.md).

id.description: Stable lookup key (DDTank BallInfo.ID). Must be unique within the catalog.

displayName.description: Display-only label. Has no stat effect.

type.description: Shell behaviour tag (DDTank BombType). Starter set only; Frozen/Cure/Fly etc. arrive with later systems.

gravityScale.description: Dimensionless multiplier on the round's gravity (DDTank Weight). >1 falls faster (heavy), <1 floats. Keeps per-shot acceleration constant.

windSensitivity.description: Dimensionless multiplier on the round's horizontal wind (DDTank Wind mult / Mass, combined). Higher = drifts more. Keeps per-shot acceleration constant.

baseDamage.description: Maximum damage at blast centre before modifiers, in HP (DDTank Power).

projectileSpeed.description: Default launch speed in m/s. Actual launch speed may be overridden by charge mechanics at fire time.
